title: Struggling to balance CFA, financial modeling, and trading (ICT/XAUUSD) — need advice
author: No-Ninja-4359
selftext:
Hey guys, I need some advice about my current situation. Here’s the breakdown:

1. Background
	•	I’m in my 3rd year, 5th semester of BBA.
	•	I recently opted for CFA (just started preparing).
	•	I’ve been into trading for 2 years, mainly focusing on XAUUSD.
	•	I learned ICT concepts and have been practicing them.

2. Trading Journey
	•	I was actively trading until the end of my 4th semester.
	•	After that, we had a 1-month gap before exams, and I stopped trading.
	•	So effectively, I’ve been away from trading for around 7 months.
	•	Currently, I’m going back to ICT content from 2016–2017 (older mentorships).
	•	I still need to cover mentorship content for 2024 & 2025 (on YouTube).

3. Current Struggle
	•	I want to finish the 2016–2017 ICT content in about 8 months.
	•	At the same time, I need to prepare for CFA and also study financial modeling.
	•	I’m struggling with time management between trading (ICT study) and CFA prep.

4. My Question
	•	How should I balance trading (ICT studies), CFA prep, and financial modeling without burning out?
	•	Should I prioritize one first (like CFA) and keep trading as secondary, or try to manage both together?
